div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Argentina (White)
div.p: 40. Department’s 37, May 11, 6 p.m. The Commission of Inquiry and Conciliation has arranged for the repatriation of prisoners held respectively by Bolivia and Paraguay. The prisoners held by Bolivia will be brought to Formosa if the Argentine Government consents to a request already made through the Argentine Embassy here for this purpose. When Argentine consent is received the Military Attaché at your Mission will be asked to proceed with an Argentine officer to Formosa to assist in connection with the repatriation. Further instructions will be sent for this purpose.
